title: TypeScript Essentials
subtitle: Types, interfaces, generics, decorators — the foundation Angular relies on
description: Master the TypeScript features Angular is built on. From basic types and interfaces through advanced generics, decorators, and utility types — everything you need to write type-safe Angular applications and answer TypeScript interview questions confidently.
learningOutcomes: Distinguish between type aliases and interfaces and know when to use each
Write and constrain generic functions and classes
Use union and intersection types to model complex domains
Apply type guards to safely narrow types at runtime
Understand how TypeScript decorators work and why Angular uses them
Leverage utility types (Partial, Pick, Omit, Record) to avoid code duplication
Enable and understand strict mode settings that prevent real bugs
